hero.title: An Open-Source Embodied Intelligence Platform for Next-Generation Robotics
hero.description: A unified hardware and software foundation that brings together the embodied brain and embodied cerebellum for education, research, and real-world deployment.

footer.description: A full-stack open-source embodied intelligence platform for education, research and robotics competition.
